tasks.name: Create GradientOrbs component skeleton
tasks.purpose: Establish the client component structure for animated floating gradient orbs that will replace BackgroundBoxes

constraints: Must be a client component ('use client' directive)
Accept className and children props for composability
Use Framer Motion for animations

tasks.input_state: No GradientOrbs component exists; BackgroundBoxes is current background pattern
tasks.output_state: GradientOrbs.tsx exists with TypeScript interface and basic component structure
tasks.acceptance_criterion: File packages/ui/src/makerkit/marketing/gradient-orbs.tsx exists with GradientOrbs export and proper TypeScript typing

tasks.name: Add gradient orb elements with radial gradients
tasks.purpose: Create the visual orb elements using CSS radial gradients with dark-mode-first color palette

constraints: Use CSS radial-gradient() for orbs
Dark gray base colors with high-luminance accents
Position orbs using absolute positioning for layering
Create 3-5 orbs of varying sizes

tasks.input_state: GradientOrbs component skeleton exists with no visual elements
tasks.output_state: Component renders 3-5 gradient orbs with CSS radial gradients and absolute positioning
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component renders visible gradient orbs using radial-gradient CSS, dark gray colors, and absolute positioning

tasks.name: Add floating animation to orbs using Framer Motion
tasks.purpose: Animate orbs with subtle floating motion using Framer Motion for smooth performance

constraints: Use Framer Motion's animate prop for infinite float loop
Subtle motion: x/y translate by 10-20px, 8-12s duration
Each orb has different animation timing for organic feel
Use transform properties only (GPU-accelerated)

tasks.input_state: Gradient orbs render but are static with no animation
tasks.output_state: Orbs float smoothly using Framer Motion with staggered timing and infinite loops
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Orbs have motion.div wrapper with animate prop containing transform values, transition durations 8-12s, and repeat: Infinity

tasks.name: Add prefers-reduced-motion support to GradientOrbs
tasks.purpose: Respect user accessibility preferences by disabling animations when prefers-reduced-motion is active

constraints: Import useReducedMotion from framer-motion
Conditionally apply animate prop based on hook value
Static orbs when reduced motion is preferred

tasks.input_state: Orbs always animate regardless of user motion preferences
tasks.output_state: Orbs respect prefers-reduced-motion media query and remain static when users prefer reduced motion
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component imports useReducedMotion, conditionally applies animation, and orbs remain static when reduced motion is preferred

tasks.name: Create HeroSectionRedesigned component skeleton
tasks.purpose: Establish the full-viewport hero container that will wrap GradientOrbs and hero content

constraints: Accept children prop for content composability
Accept className prop for customization
Full-viewport container (90vh min-height)
Proper z-index layering for background and content

tasks.output_state: HeroSectionRedesigned.tsx exists with TypeScript interface and basic container structure
tasks.acceptance_criterion: File packages/ui/src/makerkit/marketing/hero-section-redesigned.tsx exists with HeroSectionRedesigned export and proper TypeScript typing

tasks.name: Add 90vh container with GradientOrbs background
tasks.purpose: Create full-viewport hero layout with animated gradient orbs background and content wrapper

constraints: Container: min-h-[90vh] with relative positioning
GradientOrbs: absolute inset-0 for full coverage
Content wrapper: relative z-index above background
Maintain max-w-5xl focused width for content
Responsive: min-h-[600px] fallback for small viewports

tasks.input_state: HeroSectionRedesigned component skeleton exists with no layout implementation
tasks.output_state: Component renders 90vh container with GradientOrbs background and content wrapper using proper z-index layering
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component renders with min-h-[90vh], contains GradientOrbs with absolute positioning, has content wrapper with relative z-index, and matches focused width pattern
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'min-h-\[90vh\]' packages/ui/src/makerkit/marketing/hero-section-redesigned.tsx && grep -q 'GradientOrbs' packages/ui/src/makerkit/marketing/hero-section-redesigned.tsx && grep -q 'absolute inset-0' packages/ui/src/makerkit/marketing/hero-section-redesigned.tsx && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Update homepage to use HeroSectionRedesigned
tasks.purpose: Replace BackgroundBoxes with new HeroSectionRedesigned component on the marketing homepage

constraints: Import HeroSectionRedesigned from @kit/ui/marketing
Remove BackgroundBoxes import and usage
Preserve existing Hero title, subtitle, and CtaPresentationName
Maintain existing width system (widths.focused)
Keep same isolate and height classes on outer div

tasks.input_state: Homepage uses BackgroundBoxes as hero background
tasks.output_state: Homepage uses HeroSectionRedesigned with gradient orbs, existing Hero content is preserved and functional
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Homepage imports and renders HeroSectionRedesigned, BackgroundBoxes import is removed, Hero content displays correctly within new container
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'HeroSectionRedesigned' apps/web/app/(marketing)/page.tsx && ! grep -q 'BackgroundBoxes' apps/web/app/(marketing)/page.tsx && grep -q 'homepageContentConfig.hero.title' apps/web/app/(marketing)/page.tsx && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Add responsive orb sizing for mobile and tablet
tasks.purpose: Optimize gradient orb size and positioning for mobile and tablet viewports

dependencies: Tailwind CSS responsive prefixes (sm:, md:, lg:)
constraints: Mobile (default): smaller orbs, fewer visible, tighter positioning
Tablet (sm/md): medium orbs, more visible
Desktop (lg+): full-size orbs with wide spread
Use Tailwind responsive classes (w-32 sm:w-48 lg:w-64 pattern)
Adjust blur amount per breakpoint for performance

tasks.input_state: Gradient orbs have fixed desktop sizing that may overwhelm mobile viewports
tasks.output_state: Orbs scale appropriately across mobile, tablet, and desktop breakpoints using Tailwind responsive classes
tasks.acceptance_criterion: GradientOrbs component uses Tailwind responsive sizing classes (w-X sm:w-Y lg:w-Z pattern) and orbs render appropriately at all breakpoints

tasks.name: Update UI package exports for new components
tasks.purpose: Export HeroSectionRedesigned and GradientOrbs from @kit/ui package for use in apps

dependencies: Existing marketing exports pattern in package.json
constraints: Add exports for both components in package.json
Follow existing @kit/ui/marketing pattern
Maintain alphabetical ordering in exports

tasks.input_state: New components exist but are not exported from @kit/ui package
tasks.output_state: HeroSectionRedesigned and GradientOrbs are exported and importable from @kit/ui/marketing
tasks.acceptance_criterion: package.json exports contain entries for gradient-orbs and hero-section-redesigned under makerkit/marketing path
tasks.verification_command: grep -q '"./marketing".*"gradient-orbs"' packages/ui/package.json && grep -q '"./marketing".*"hero-section-redesigned"' packages/ui/package.json && pnpm typecheck
